task_summary: SP33 added experiments/mew-ghost/mew_wisp.py as the product-named Python entrypoint, delegating to ghost.main while keeping ghost.py as the historical compatibility implementation module.

tests_run.result: product-named entrypoint rendered live wisp cat resident through a bounded watch iteration
product-named entrypoint preserved deterministic fixture-terminal rendering

proof_artifacts: live and fixture mew_wisp.py --wisp smoke outputs inspected
notes: Mew authored a thin product-named entrypoint and focused tests. The entrypoint imports ghost.main only, avoiding duplicate argument parsing, shell execution, subprocess calls, core imports, or hidden monitoring.
